message:
feat(cli): Add doctor_rich for rich_rust output

P4.1: Enhance doctor command with styled check results

- Add doctor_rich() using DcgConsole and markup syntax
- Dispatch to doctor_rich when rich-output feature is enabled
- Keep doctor_pretty for non-rich fallback
- Use structured DoctorReport for clean separation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
